Capture and organize tasks instantly using easy-flowing, natural language. Focus on what’s important Stay organized and focused Achieve mental clarity by sorting tasks into Today, Upcoming, or using custom filters. See only what you need, when you need it. Plan with confidence Simplify your planning Make the most of your time. Schedule due dates, visualize your week in calendar view, and set recurring tasks with ease. Organize your teamwork, too A home for your team’s tasks Give your team a shared space to collaborate and stay on top of it all – alongside but separate from your personal tasks and projects. Work Personal Education Management Marketing & Sales Customer Support Work Accounting Tasks Business Travel Packing Personal Appointments Elf on the Shelf Ideas Education Class Planning Educator Planning Management 1-on-1 Meeting Employee Onboarding Marketing & Sales Blog Post Campaign Tracker Customer Support Feature Requests Help Center Article Accounting Tasks Create a system to keep your books, receipts, and invoices organized. List Business Travel Packing Never forget your laptop charger, lucky shoes, or passport again. List Client Management Organize your work with clients from the smallest to largest details. List Deep Work Practice prioritizing focus and eliminating distraction with this template. List Meeting Agenda Waste less time in meetings, ensuring they're efficient and action-oriented. List Appointments Never forget (or forget to prepare for) another meeting or appointment. List Elf on the Shelf Ideas For when those pesky elves need some new ideas - ordered by effort 😉 List Fitness Make fitness a habit by adding your favorite exercises to your to-do list. List Goal Tracker Build a system that connects your high-level goals to your daily actions. List Grocery List Keep your grocery list wherever you go by adding it all to your Todoist. List Class Planning Keep all the many details of your class plans organized and in one place. List Educator Planning Stay productive as an educator whether you’re in front of the classroom or planning and grading after-hours. List Language Learning Set a goal, pick a method, and create a habit of learning a new language. List Student Planning Never forget a single reading or assignment with this handy checklist for organizing each course. List Student Project Share this project with your classmates and make your way towards an A. Board 1-on-1 Meeting Ensure priorities are clear and keep a pulse on how your team's feeling. List Employee Onboarding Make sure newcomers have the information they need to hit the ground running. List Goals & Feedback Meeting Encourage frequent feedback and goal-oriented guidance with this template. List Hiring Pipeline Stay organized and communicative as candidates progress through your hiring pipeline. Board Blog Post Go from inspiration to publication with this template for your blog. List Campaign Tracker Track ad campaigns and keep a pulse on your marketing initiatives. List Content Calendar Strategize, organize, and publish your marketing content on schedule. Calendar Content Pipeline Keep ideas flowing while making progress on content you're already drafting. Board Event Planning Don't let any crucial event planning details slip through the cracks. List Feature Requests Monitor (and act on) the valuable feedback that your Support team receives. List Help Center Article Follow this template to take a help center article from idea to published. List Issue Tracking Stay on top of the bugs and issues (both big and small) in your software. Rest assured that we’ll never sell out to the highest bidder.
